ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stars" (
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each star */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the star in million years */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the star in solar masses */,
  "luminosity" REAL /* Luminosity of the star in solar luminosities */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Surface temperature of the star in Kelvin */,
  "gravity" REAL /* Surface gravity of the star in m/s^2 */,
  "radius" REAL /* Radius of the star in solar radii */,
  "metallicity" REAL /* Metallicity of the star */,
  "rotation_period" REAL /* Rotation period of the star in days */,
  "magnetic_field" REAL /* Magnetic field strength of the star */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectral_types" (
  "spectral_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectral type */,
  "spectral_type" TEXT /* Spectral type of the star (e.g., O, B, A, F, G, K, M) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spectral type */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range of the spectral type */,
  "luminosity_range" TEXT /* Luminosity range of the spectral type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spectral_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evolutionary_stages" (
  "evolutionary_stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolutionary stage */,
  "evolutionary_stage" TEXT /* Evolutionary stage of the star (e.g., main sequence, red giant, white dwarf) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evolutionary stage */,
  "lifespan" TEXT /* Lifespan of the evolutionary stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evolutionary_stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "star_positions" (
  "star_id" INTEGER /* ID of the star */,
  "ra" REAL /* Right ascension of the star in degrees */,
  "dec" REAL /* Declination of the star in degrees */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance to the star in parsecs */,
  "galactic_longitude" REAL /* Galactic longitude of the star in degrees */,
  "galactic_latitude" REAL /* Galactic latitude of the star in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "star_motions" (
  "star_id" INTEGER /* ID of the star */,
  "pm_ra" REAL /* Proper motion in right ascension in milliarcseconds per year */,
  "pm_dec" REAL /* Proper motion in declination in milliarcseconds per year */,
  "rv" REAL /* Radial velocity in km/s */,
  "space_velocity_x" REAL /* Space velocity in the x-direction in km/s */,
  "space_velocity_y" REAL /* Space velocity in the y-direction in km/s */,
  "space_velocity_z" REAL /* Space velocity in the z-direction in km/s */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "star_features" (
  "star_id" INTEGER /* ID of the star */,
  "feature" TEXT /* Notable feature of the star (e.g., binary, multiple, variable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "discovery_date" TEXT /* Date of discovery of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department affiliated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "star_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "star_id" INTEGER /* ID of the star being observed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used to make the observation */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data collected during the observation */,
  "quality_flag" INTEGER /* Quality flag for the observation (e.g., 0 = good, 1 = bad) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_star_observations_star_id FOREIGN KEY ("star_id") REFERENCES stars ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "star_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "star_id" INTEGER /* ID of the star being modeled */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., theoretical, empirical) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to generate the model */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Creator of the model */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date of creation of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_star_models_star_id FOREIGN KEY ("star_id") REFERENCES stars ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "star_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "star_id" INTEGER /* ID of the star being predicted */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction (e.g., future luminosity, final mass) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the prediction */,
  "uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty of the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_star_predictions_star_id FOREIGN KEY ("star_id") REFERENCES stars ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "star_references" (
  "star_id" INTEGER /* ID of the star */,
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the reference */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the reference */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal of the reference */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_id", "reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "star_notes" (
  "star_id" INTEGER /* ID of the star */,
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note about the star */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the note */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_id", "note_id")
)
